'''Lyyr Zatoq''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] pilot in [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] from [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]]. Lyyr's [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] was [[Battle of Distna|shot down]] in battle above the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Distna]] in the [[Corvis Minor system/Legends|Corvis Minor system]] by [[Delak Krennel]]'s TIE fighters and bombers. Her body was recovered by [[Booster Terrik]] and [[Mirax Terrik Horn|Mirax Terrik]]. The rest of Rogue Squadron, aside from [[Wes Janson/Legends|Wes Janson]] and [[Asyr Sei'lar]] (whose survival was kept secret at her request) was believed dead.
